proposal1.heroHeadline: Mr. Edutainment is losing 200 hours a year on proposals. Here is exactly where it goes.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Your team spends hours crafting each proposal. Now, generate them in 47 seconds with AI.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Every problem below is a drain on your time and resources.

problems.title: Endless Drafting
problems.description: It takes 3 hours to draft each proposal manually. With 50 proposals a year, that's 150 hours not spent on clients.

problems.title: Inconsistent Branding
problems.description: Inconsistent proposals weaken your brand. Each inconsistency could cost you a client, totaling thousands in lost revenue.

problems.title: Missed Opportunities
problems.description: Spending time drafting proposals means delayed responses to prospects. Each delay risks losing clients, costing potential contracts.

problems.title: Manual Errors
problems.description: Human errors in proposals can lead to misunderstandings. Each mistake can cost deals, potentially losing thousands each year.

problems.title: Lack of Personalization
problems.description: Generic proposals miss the mark. Each impersonal touch risks losing a client, costing you tailored service opportunities.

problems.title: Tracking Challenges
problems.description: Without tracking, proposals vanish into the ether. Each lost follow-up could mean a lost deal, bleeding potential revenue.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system replaces all these inefficiencies with precision and speed.

solutions.title: Instant Drafting
solutions.description: Currently, you spend hours drafting. Our system generates proposals in under 60 seconds.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Branding inconsistencies weaken your image. Our AI ensures every proposal is consistently branded.

solutions.title: Immediate Response
solutions.description: Delayed responses risk client loss. Our system enables instant proposal generation and quicker client engagement.

solutions.title: Error-Free Proposals
solutions.description: Manual errors cost you deals. Our AI minimizes errors, ensuring clarity and precision in every proposal.

solutions.title: Proposal Tracking
solutions.description: Without tracking, proposals are forgotten. Our system tracks every proposal, ensuring follow-ups are timely and precise.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Mr. Edutainment's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Mr. Edutainment around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Mr. Edutainment.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Transform Acme Corp's Reach with Mr. Edutainment's Unique Approach.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: Let's captivate and convert your audience with strategies that spark joy and drive growth.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Right now, Acme Corp is missing out on valuable opportunities.

problems.title: Low Website Conversion
problems.description: Every visitor who leaves without converting is revenue walking out the door. This could mean thousands in lost sales monthly.

problems.title: Weak Brand Presence
problems.description: Without a strong brand, Acme Corp is just another face in the crowd. This limits your ability to attract and retain loyal customers.

problems.title: Underutilized Social Media
problems.description: Missing engagement on social platforms means missing a conversation with potential clients, costing you visibility and growth.

problems.title: Ineffective Email Campaigns
problems.description: Unopened emails are missed chances to connect. This results in lost opportunities for repeat business and customer loyalty.

problems.title: Poor Customer Retention
problems.description: High churn rates are not just numbers. They translate to significant lost revenue and increased costs to acquire new customers.

problems.title: Limited Market Insights
problems.description: Without proper insights, Acme Corp is flying blind. This could mean misaligned strategies and wasted marketing dollars.

proposal2.solutionIntro: We have the perfect solutions to turn these losses into wins.

solutions.title: Creative Campaigns
solutions.description: Engage your audience with campaigns that are as entertaining as they are effective. This will boost your brand presence and conversion rates.

solutions.title: SEO Optimization
solutions.description: Optimize your site to capture more organic traffic. This will increase visibility and drive more qualified leads to your doorstep.

solutions.title: Email Marketing
solutions.description: Craft email campaigns that your audience will actually look forward to. This will improve open rates and drive more repeat business.

solutions.title: Analytics & Insights
solutions.description: Gain actionable insights with our analytics tools. This will help you make informed decisions and refine your strategies for better results.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Choosing Mr. Edutainment means choosing a partner who cares.

whyUsCards.title: Playful Creativity
whyUsCards.description: We bring a playful spirit to every project, ensuring your brand stands out with warmth and character.

whyUsCards.title: Client-Centric Approach
whyUsCards.description: Your success is our success. We work closely with you to ensure your goals are met and exceeded.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Expertise
whyUsCards.description: With years of experience, our team knows how to turn challenges into opportunities for growth.

whyUsCards.title: Results Driven
whyUsCards.description: We're all about getting tangible results. Our strategies are designed to deliver measurable success.

proposal2.teamIntro: Meet the team dedicated to making your brand shine.

team.name: Adam Fairhead
team.bio: Adam leads strategy and client relationships at Mr. Edutainment. His passion is creating campaigns that are both fun and effective.

proposal2.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Discovery
process.description: Understanding your brand, goals, and challenges.

process.title: Strategy Development
process.description: Crafting a customized plan for success.

process.title: Implementation
process.description: Bringing the strategy to life with precision.

proposal2.footerSub: Unlocking potential, one story at a time.

lead.company_description: A modern-day edutainment and creative media brand studio. Founded in 2009, we develop viral marketing for online businesses using well-researched edutainment video advertising and immersive, gamified webpages.
lead.headline: 20 Years Of Growing Brands With The Power Of Edutainment • My Newsletter Shows You How • My Strategy Program Builds IT With You
lead.keywords: web design, web development, saas, internet marketing, marketing automation, copywriting, conversion rate optimization, facebook advertising, marketing strategy, advertising services, information technology & services, computer software, marketing & advertising, enterprise software, enterprises, b2b, writing & editing
lead.personalization: You’ve got that modern-day edutainment vibe going, mixing education and entertainment in a fresh way.
